Point camera at the road map image
Tap a traffic light to toggle it

⚠️ Missing target.zpt

To use image tracking you need a trained target file.

1. Go to zap.works → New Universal AR project
2. Upload 360_F_433896279_PDtlsO4t9oCtFaiI9SM3ewPRwAhfScmi.jpg as an Image Target
3. Download the .zpt file and rename it target.zpt
4. Place target.zpt in this project folder and restart

Then point your camera at a printed (or screen-displayed) copy of the road map image.
